en: Finish this table with your partner.
zh: 请和你的伙伴完成这张表格。

en: There is a dance class on Sunday at 1 p.m.
zh: 星期天下午1点有一堂舞蹈课。

en: I like dancing, and I need a partner.
zh: 我喜欢跳舞，而且我需要一个伙伴。
科学俱乐部，你的俱乐部！

en: What do you do on Sundays?
What is your hobby? Do you like reading? I have great books. We can share!
zh: 你的爱好是什么？你喜欢读书吗？我有很多好书，我们可以分享！

en: Do you want to learn about robots? Come to the science room! Meet Robin. He teaches students to make robots.
zh: 你想学习关于机器人吗？来科学实验室！认识Robin。他教学生制作机器人。

en: Do you like food? Do you want to cook? Join us!
zh: 你喜欢吃东西吗？你想做饭吗？加入我们！
Mandy 谈论关于巧克力的话题。

en: Who (do/does) the dishes? Don’t worry. We all do them together.
zh: 谁洗碗？别担心。我们一起洗。

en: We meet every Wednesday afternoon at 4 o’clock in the dining hall.
zh: 我们每周三下午4点在餐厅里见面。

en: Do the four people in the text want pen pals?
zh: 文本中的四个人想成为笔友吗？

en: How many hobbies can you find in the text? Write them down.
zh: 你能找出文本中的多少爱好？写下来。

en: Different people in our club teach different things.
zh: 我们俱乐部里不同的人教不同的东西。

en: Jane has a cat. The cat loves to sleep. Every afternoon Jane studies Chinese and does her homework. After that, Jane teaches her sister to draw. The cat just sleeps.
zh: 简有一个猫。猫喜欢睡觉。每天下午，简学习汉语，做作业。之后，简教她的姐姐画画。猫只是睡觉。

en: Zac lives in a forest. He likes singing and dancing very much.
zh: 杰克住在森林里。他非常喜欢唱歌和跳舞。

en: Every day the squirrels have to give the Monkey King gifts.
zh: 每天松鼠们不得不给猴王送礼物。

en: Then the Monkey King lets them get food from his forest.
zh: 然后猴王让他们从他的森林里拿食物。

en: One day, Zac sang for the king. The king was very angry and shouted, "Go away!"
zh: 有一天，杰克为国王唱歌。国王非常生气并大声喊道，“走开！”

en: Then he threw Zac out of the tree.
zh: 然后他把杰克从树上扔了出去。

en: Zac got up and looked at his tail. It was really bushy!
zh: 杰克起床并看着他的尾巴。他的尾巴非常茂盛！

en: Zac liked his new tail, and so did all the other squirrels.
zh: 杰克喜欢他的新尾巴，其他的松鼠们也喜欢。

en: So from that day on all squirrels’ tails were bushy.
zh: 所以从那天起，所有的松鼠的尾巴都变得茂盛了。

en: What does your mother do, Oliver?
zh: 你的妈妈做什么，奥利弗？

en: Cool! I’m going to be a head teacher one day.
zh: 真棒！我想有一天也会做校长。

en: How does he go to work? By plane?
zh: 他怎么去上班？坐飞机吗？

en: Hey! My mother works near the sea too.
zh: 嘿！我的妈妈也在海边工作。

en: Today is Parents’ Day. Who will come?

zh: 1. 莎拉的妈妈今天可以/不可以来。

en: 2. Her father is a doctor/teacher/taxi driver.
zh: 2. 她的爸爸是医生/老师/出租车司机。

en: Sarah: Is your father here today?
zh: 莎拉：你的爸爸今天在吗？
奥利弗：不，他在澳大利亚。

en: Oliver: He’s a businessman. He often goes to other countries.
zh: 奥利弗：他是一名商人。他经常去其他国家。

en: Sarah: And what does your mother do?
zh: 莎拉：你的妈妈做什么工作？

en: Oliver: Yeah. She’ll be here today!
zh: 奥利弗：是的。她今天会在那里！

en: Sarah: Do you want to be a head teacher too?
Oliver: No, I want to be a businessman.

zh: 奥利弗的爸爸/妈妈做什么工作？
你的爸爸/妈妈做什么工作？

en: taxi driver clean-er writer singer dancer football player
zh: 出租车司机 清洁工 记者 歌手 舞者 足球运动员

en: Zhang Peng: Is your father a postman?
zh: 张鹏：你的爸爸是邮递员吗？
干奶奶的爸爸是邮递员。
周佳的妈妈是工厂工人。

en: What does Jiao Jie’s mother do?
He sees lots of fish every day!
zh: 他每天都能看到很多鱼！

en: I see. How does he go to work? By boat?
zh: 我明白了。他怎么去工作？乘船吗？

en: No. He works on a boat.
He goes to work by bike.
He has a very healthy life.
zh: 他过着非常健康的生活。

en: Yes. He works very hard and stays healthy.
zh: 是的。他工作很努力，而且保持健康。

en: We should study hard and stay healthy, too.
zh: 我们应该努力学习，保持健康，也。
迈克的叔叔在哪里工作？

en: How does he go to work? By boat?
Where does your father/mother work? How does he/she go to work?
zh: 你的爸爸/妈妈在哪里工作？他/她怎么去工作？

en: List five jobs. Compare with your partner. How many different jobs are there in both lists?
zh: 列出五个工作，和你的伙伴比较。两个列表里有多少不同的工作？

en: Hu Bin likes sports. He is good at football, ping-pong and basketball.
zh: 胡斌喜欢运动。他擅长足球、乒乓球和篮球。

en: He often goes running after school.
He wants to work in a gym.
If you like sports, you can be a coach, a sports reporter, or a PE teacher.
zh: 如果你喜欢运动，你可以成为教练、体育记者或体育老师。

en: If you can type quickly, you can be a secretary.
zh: 如果你能打字很快，你可以成为秘书。

en: Robin wants to be a scientist like Wu Binbin’s grandfather.
zh: 罗宾想成为像吴彬彬爷爷一样的科学家。

en: He studies very hard, and he wants to work in a university.
zh: 他学习很努力，而且想在大学工作。

en: If you like science, you can be a scientist.
zh: 如果你喜欢科学，你可以成为科学家。

en: Choose a title for the text.
What does he/she want to be?
At the Real World Camp, children can try to do different jobs.
zh: 在‘真实世界’营，孩子们可以尝试不同的工作。

en: Do you want to go to the camp?
Which job do you want to do?

zh: 你的爸爸/妈妈做什么工作？

en: I allow my child to go to the camp.
He is good at football//, ping-pong//and basketball.
zh: 他擅长足球//、乒乓球//和篮球。

en: If you like sports//, you can be a coach//, a sports reporter//, or a PE teacher.
zh: 如果你喜欢运动//，你可以做教练//、体育记者//或者体育老师。

en: Sorry, I didn’t hear you. What Mary has does Mary have?
zh: 对不起，我没听清。玛丽______什么？

en: Yes. What other unusual jobs can you think of?
zh: 是的。你能想出其他的什么不寻常的工作吗？
比如狮子驯兽师怎么样？
比如蜜蜂农场主怎么样？

en: Maybe you can be a computer game tester.
zh: 也许你可以做电脑游戏测试员。

en: You can play games and work at home.
zh: 你可以玩游戏并在家工作。
比如魔术师的助理怎么样？

en: Listen again and answer the questions.
What does Wei Fang’s uncle do?
Will the children go home together?
He goes to school by bus.
My aunt works in a gym.
Zip: I want to be a nut cracker.
Zip: Oh, no. I don’t like that.
Zoom: Well, what do you want to be?
Here you are. I’ll go and get some drinks.
What?! How could you eat all the popcorn?!
zh: 怎么？你怎么把所有的爆米花都吃光了？！

en: Mum, if I feel angry, what should I do?
zh: 妈妈，如果我感到生气，我应该怎么办？

en: Well, first, take a deep breath.
Then you should count to ten.
After that, you won’t feel so angry.
zh: 然后你就不那么生气了。

en: Mum, I feel ill. Should I count to ten, too?
zh: 妈妈，我感觉不舒服。我数十次吗？

en: No, dear. You should see a doctor.
zh: 不，亲爱的。你应该去看医生。

en: A. Let’s try It’s cold outside. Sam is talking with Sarah.
zh: A. 让我们试试吧。外面冷。山姆在和莎拉说话。
山姆：这个动画片讲的是什么？

en: Sarah: It’s about a cat. The cat is a police officer.
zh: 莎拉：讲的是一只猫。猫是一个警察。

en: Sarah: He chases the mice. They’re afraid of him.
zh: 莎拉：他追老鼠。它们害怕他。

en: Sarah: Because the mice are bad. They hurt people.
zh: 莎拉：因为老鼠很坏。它们伤害了人们。

en: The cat is angry with them.
Sam: Maybe our cat is chasing a mouse now!
zh: 山姆：也许我们的猫现在正在追老鼠！

en: Why is the cat angry with the mice?
It is a sunny morning. Robin is going to sit on the grass when he hears, "Wait!"
zh: 这是一个晴朗的早晨。罗宾在听到“等等”的时候，去草地上坐下。

en: It is a little ant. He is afraid.
zh: 这是一个小蚂蚁。他很害怕。

en: "Please don’t sit on me. One day I can help you."
zh: "请不要坐在我身上。有一天我可以帮助你。"

en: "Don’t worry, little ant. I won’t sit on you,"
zh: "别担心，小蚂蚁。我不会坐在你身上,"

en: The next day, it is raining. Robin is in the park. He is stuck in the mud. He is worried.
zh: 第二天，下雨了。罗宾在公园里。他被困在泥里。他很担心。

en: Then he hears, "Let us help you!" It is the ant and all of his friends. They are strong. They pull Robin out of the mud.
zh: 然后他听到“帮帮我们”！是蚂蚁和他的朋友们。他们很强壮。他们把罗宾从泥里拉了出来。

en: What does the story tell us?
zh: 这个故事告诉我们什么？

en: A. We should always be nice to each other.
zh: A. 我们应该总是对彼此友善。
B. 我们不应该伤害蚂蚁。

en: Fill in the blanks and retell the story.
How does cold weather make John feel?
zh: 寒冷的天气让约翰感觉怎么样？
奥利弗现在感觉怎么样？

en: Zip: My favourite TV show is on soon.
zh: 齐普：我最喜欢的电视节目就要开始了。

en: Let’s watch it. Do you have any popcorn?
zh: 让我们一起看看吧。你有什么爆米花吗？

en: Zoom: I’ll go and make some.
Zip: I can’t wait. I love popcorn. I’m so happy!
zh: 我迫不及待。我喜欢爆米花。我太高兴了！

en: Zip: He must be making lots of popcorn. Yum!
zh: 他一定在做很多爆米花。真好吃！

en: Zip: Where is he? I’m a little worried now. I’ll go and check.
zh: 他在哪里？我现在有点担心。我去看看。

en: Zip: Oh! Zoom, what are you doing here?
Zoom: Oh, don’t be angry! Count to ten and take a deep breath.
zh: 哦，别生气了！数到十，深呼吸一下。

en: Zoom: Well, I planted the popcorn seeds.
